items.title: Smartphone-Based Semi-Immersive Virtual Reality Enhances Upper Extremity Function in Subacute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=52) found that smartphone-based virtual reality significantly enhanced upper extremity function in subacute stroke patients compared to conventional physical therapy.
items.curatedReason: A randomized controlled trial with N=52 shows smartphone-based VR significantly improves upper extremity function in subacute stroke compared to conventional PT alone (mean difference 3.8 points on Fugl-Meyer Assessment, p<0.01). This warrants integrating low-cost VR into your stroke rehab protocols.
items.titleZh: 基于智能手机的半沉浸式虚拟现实可改善亚急性期卒中患者的上肢功能：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=52）发现，基于智能手机的虚拟现实（VR）相比常规物理治疗，能显著改善亚急性期卒中患者的上肢功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: A randomized controlled trial with N=52 shows smartphone-based VR significantly improves upper extremity function in subacute stroke compared to conventional PT alone (mean difference 3.8 points on Fugl-Meyer Assessment, p<0.01). This warrants integrating low-cost VR into your stroke rehab protocols.

items.title: A decline in skeletal muscle NOX4 abrogates exercise-induced adaptive homeostasis and exacerbates biological aging.
items.summary: Research in Science Advances suggests declining skeletal muscle NOX4 impairs exercise-induced adaptive homeostasis and exacerbates biological aging.
items.curatedReason: This study in Science Advances (N=10 mice, male) links declining skeletal muscle NOX4 to impaired adaptive homeostasis and accelerated aging. While animal-based, it provides a mechanistic insight into why exercise is crucial for aging and suggests potential targets for future interventions.
items.titleZh: 骨骼肌NOX4的衰退会破坏运动诱导的适应性稳态并加剧生物衰老。
items.summaryZh: 《Science Advances》的研究表明，骨骼肌中NADPH氧化酶4（NOX4）水平的下降会削弱运动诱导的适应性稳态，并加速生物衰老过程。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study in Science Advances (N=10 mice, male) links declining skeletal muscle NOX4 to impaired adaptive homeostasis and accelerated aging. While animal-based, it provides a mechanistic insight into why exercise is crucial for aging and suggests potential targets for future interventions.

items.title: Cardiorespiratory Exercise Intensity Prescription in Cardiovascular Rehabilitation: Do Updated Guideline Recommendations Reflect Real Individual Effort Responses?
items.summary: This study questions whether current AHA/AACVPR guidelines for cardiorespiratory exercise intensity in cardiac rehab accurately reflect individual effort responses, using data from 2,554 patients.
items.curatedReason: This retrospective study (N=2,554) evaluates current AHA/AACVPR exercise intensity guidelines for cardiovascular rehab against actual HR responses at ventilatory thresholds. It found discrepancies, suggesting current prescriptions might not reflect individual effort accurately. Use caution and individualize intensity.
items.titleZh: 心血管康复中呼吸心肺运动强度处方的准确性：更新的指南建议是否反映了个体真实的运动反应？
items.summaryZh: 本研究（N=2554）评估了美国心脏协会/美国心血管和肺康复协会（AHA/AACVPR）更新的心肺运动强度指南（基于储备心率百分比%HRR）与患者通气阈值时的实际心率（HR）反应是否一致，发现存在差异，提示当前处方可能未能准确反映个体运动强度。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study (N=2,554) evaluates current AHA/AACVPR exercise intensity guidelines for cardiovascular rehab against actual HR responses at ventilatory thresholds. It found discrepancies, suggesting current prescriptions might not reflect individual effort accurately. Use caution and individualize intensity.

items.title: Role of Prehabilitation in Improving Outcomes after Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This narrative review discusses the role of prehabilitation in improving outcomes after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR), noting significant variability in post-procedure results.
items.curatedReason: Prehabilitation before ACL reconstruction shows promise in improving outcomes, but this review is narrative and lacks specific data on sample size or effect size to recommend immediate practice change. Consider it for patient selection if conventional rehab falls short.
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术前康复在改善预后中的作用。
items.summaryZh: 本文为一篇叙述性综述，探讨了前交叉韧带重建术（ACLR）术前康复在改善患者预后中的作用，并指出术后结果存在显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Prehabilitation before ACL reconstruction shows promise in improving outcomes, but this review is narrative and lacks specific data on sample size or effect size to recommend immediate practice change. Consider it for patient selection if conventional rehab falls short.

items.title: Tennis leg: Diagnosis and management - A state-of-the-art review.
items.summary: This review details the diagnosis and conservative management of 'tennis leg' (medial gastrocnemius-soleus junction injuries), common in athletes, emphasizing clinical diagnosis supported by imaging.
items.curatedReason: This state-of-the-art review provides a solid overview of diagnosis and management for 'tennis leg' (medial gastrocnemius-soleus junction injury). It confirms conservative management is standard, but lacks new evidence or practice-changing insights beyond current knowledge.
items.titleZh: 网球腿：诊断与管理——一篇最新进展综述。
items.summaryZh: 本文是一篇关于“网球腿”（腓肠肌内侧头-比目鱼肌连接处损伤）的最新进展综述，详细介绍了这种在运动员中常见的损伤的诊断和保守治疗方法，强调临床诊断结合影像学检查。
items.curatedReasonEn: This state-of-the-art review provides a solid overview of diagnosis and management for 'tennis leg' (medial gastrocnemius-soleus junction injury). It confirms conservative management is standard, but lacks new evidence or practice-changing insights beyond current knowledge.

items.title: The impacts of common chronic disease on autophagy and cellular stress during exertional heat stress in peripheral blood mononuclear cells of older males.
items.summary: This study investigates how common chronic diseases affect autophagy and cellular stress in older males during exertional heat stress.
items.curatedReason: This study (N=15 older males) examined chronic disease impact on autophagy and cellular stress during heat stress. It provides cellular-level insights into how age and disease affect responses to physiological stress, relevant for understanding older patient limitations.
items.titleZh: 常见慢性病对老年男性在劳累性热应激期间的自噬和细胞应激的影响。
items.summaryZh: 本研究探讨了常见慢性病（如高血压、2型糖尿病）如何影响老年男性在劳累性热应激期间的自噬和细胞应激反应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study (N=15 older males) examined chronic disease impact on autophagy and cellular stress during heat stress. It provides cellular-level insights into how age and disease affect responses to physiological stress, relevant for understanding older patient limitations.
items.journal: American journal of physiology. Regulatory, integrative and comparative physiology

items.title: Prognostic value of distance-saturation product in COPD: Korean nationwide cohort study.
items.summary: A Korean nationwide cohort study (N=4,879) evaluates the prognostic value of the distance-saturation product (DSP) in COPD patients, suggesting a potentially different optimal threshold compared to Western cohorts.
items.curatedReason: This large cohort study (N=4,879) validates the prognostic value of the distance-saturation product (DSP) in Korean COPD patients, finding a lower optimal threshold than previously reported in Western cohorts. This could refine risk stratification for this population.
items.titleZh: 距离-饱和度乘积在COPD中的预后价值：韩国全国队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项韩国全国性队列研究（N=4879）评估了距离-饱和度乘积（DSP，6分钟步行距离x最低血氧饱和度）在慢性阻塞性肺病（COPD）患者中的预后价值，并提出了可能与西方队列不同的最佳阈值。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large cohort study (N=4,879) validates the prognostic value of the distance-saturation product (DSP) in Korean COPD patients, finding a lower optimal threshold than previously reported in Western cohorts. This could refine risk stratification for this population.

items.title: Safety and Feasibility of an Asynchronous AI-Integrated Tele-Pulmonary Rehabilitation Application Among Patients with COPD.
items.summary: This study evaluates the safety and feasibility of an asynchronous, AI-integrated tele-pulmonary rehabilitation application for patients with COPD.
items.curatedReason: This study assesses the safety and feasibility of an AI-integrated tele-pulmonary rehabilitation app for COPD patients. While promising for access, it's a feasibility study, not efficacy. Hold off on widespread adoption until more robust data emerges.
items.titleZh: 异步人工智能集成远程肺康复应用程序在COPD患者中的安全性和可行性。
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在评估一款异步、人工智能集成的远程肺康复（TPR）应用程序在慢性阻塞性肺病（COPD）患者中的安全性与可行性，以期改善康复服务的可及性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study assesses the safety and feasibility of an AI-integrated tele-pulmonary rehabilitation app for COPD patients. While promising for access, it's a feasibility study, not efficacy. Hold off on widespread adoption until more robust data emerges.
items.journal: International journal of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy on physical and mental health promotion in adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 18 studies (1213 participants) found manual therapy effectively promotes physical and mental health in adults, though effect sizes vary.
items.curatedReason: This systematic review and meta-analysis (N=18 studies, 1213 participants) found manual therapy improved physical and mental health in adults, but effect sizes were generally small to moderate and heterogeneity was high. Use it as an adjunct, not a primary intervention.
items.titleZh: 手法疗法在促进成人身心健康方面的有效性：一项系统评价和荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖18项研究（1213名参与者）的系统评价和荟萃分析发现，手法疗法能有效促进成人身心健康，但效应量普遍为小到中等，且研究间异质性较高。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis (N=18 studies, 1213 participants) found manual therapy improved physical and mental health in adults, but effect sizes were generally small to moderate and heterogeneity was high. Use it as an adjunct, not a primary intervention.

items.title: Effects of foot-specific exercise with or without taping on navicular drop, foot posture, and plantar pressure: A randomized comparative trial.
items.summary: A randomized comparative trial (N=34) found that foot-specific exercise, with or without taping, similarly improved navicular drop and foot posture in individuals with flatfoot.
items.curatedReason: This RCT (N=34) compared foot-specific exercise (FSE) with and without taping for flatfoot. Both groups improved navicular drop and foot posture, with no significant difference between FSE alone and FSE+taping. This suggests taping may not be essential for these outcomes.
items.titleZh: 带或不带贴扎的足部专项运动对舟骨下沉、足部姿势和足底压力的影响：一项随机比较试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机比较试验（N=34）发现，单纯进行足部专项运动（FSE）或联合贴扎（FSE+T）均能改善扁平足患者的舟骨下沉和足部姿势，且两组间无显著差异，提示贴扎并非必须。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT (N=34) compared foot-specific exercise (FSE) with and without taping for flatfoot. Both groups improved navicular drop and foot posture, with no significant difference between FSE alone and FSE+taping. This suggests taping may not be essential for these outcomes.
items.journal: Journal of bodywork and movement therapies

items.title: Retrospective analysis of guideline-based massage therapy in primary care for musculoskeletal disorders.
items.summary: This retrospective study analyzes guideline-based massage therapy for musculoskeletal disorders (MSDs) in primary care, acknowledging controversy due to limited robust evidence for its effectiveness.
items.curatedReason: This retrospective analysis assesses guideline-based massage therapy for MSDs. While it explores potential utility, the conclusion on its effectiveness is still debated due to a lack of robust evidence. Don't rely on it as a primary treatment.
items.titleZh: 关于肌肉骨骼疾病初级保健中基于指南的按摩疗法的回顾性分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性研究分析了初级保健中针对肌肉骨骼疾病（MSDs）的基于指南的按摩疗法，但承认由于缺乏有力的证据，其有效性仍存在争议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective analysis assesses guideline-based massage therapy for MSDs. While it explores potential utility, the conclusion on its effectiveness is still debated due to a lack of robust evidence. Don't rely on it as a primary treatment.
items.journal: Advances in clinical and experimental medicine : official organ Wroclaw Medical University

items.title: Integrating neurocognitive strategies into rehabilitation after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: A clinical practice-oriented narrative review.
items.summary: This narrative review discusses integrating neurocognitive strategies into rehabilitation after ACL reconstruction to improve return-to-sport outcomes, addressing challenges in unpredictable environments.
items.curatedReason: This review highlights the gap between ACLR's biomechanical success and return-to-sport rates, emphasizing neurocognitive strategies for unpredictable environments. While insightful, it's a narrative review lacking specific intervention data for direct clinical application.
items.titleZh: 将神经认知策略融入前交叉韧带重建术后康复：一项面向临床实践的叙述性综述。
items.summaryZh: 本文是关于将神经认知策略融入前交叉韧带重建术（ACLR）后康复的叙述性综述，旨在提高重返运动（RTS）的成功率，尤其关注在不可预测环境中运动表现的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review highlights the gap between ACLR's biomechanical success and return-to-sport rates, emphasizing neurocognitive strategies for unpredictable environments. While insightful, it's a narrative review lacking specific intervention data for direct clinical application.
items.journal: Journal of bodywork and movement therapies

items.title: We Thought You'd Never Ask: Insights From the Health of Elite Retired Australian Female Athletes Survey.
items.summary: The "Health of Elite Retired Australian Female Athletes Survey" reveals historical underrepresentation in research, aiming to describe their long-term health and inform female-specific athlete care systems.
items.curatedReason: This survey of retired elite Australian female athletes highlights underrepresentation in research and calls for female-specific care. While important for understanding long-term health, it's descriptive and doesn't offer specific PT interventions.
items.titleZh: 我们以为您永远不会问：精英退役澳大利亚女运动员健康调查的见解。
items.summaryZh: “精英退役澳大利亚女运动员健康调查”揭示了该群体在体育医学和康复研究中长期存在的代表性不足问题，旨在描述她们的长期健康状况，并为制定女性运动员专属照护系统提供信息。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of retired elite Australian female athletes highlights underrepresentation in research and calls for female-specific care. While important for understanding long-term health, it's descriptive and doesn't offer specific PT interventions.

items.title: [A 5-year follow-up study on quality of life and recurrence after endoscopic sinus surgery for chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps in children].
items.summary: This 5-year follow-up study evaluates functional endoscopic sinus surgery (FESS) for pediatric chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps, analyzing quality of life and recurrence rates.
items.curatedReason: This 5-year follow-up study on pediatric chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps after FESS provides quality of life and recurrence data. It's more clinical outcomes focused than PT specific, but relevant for understanding post-surgical pediatric patient trajectories.
items.titleZh: 儿童鼻息肉慢性鼻窦炎内镜手术5年随访研究：生活质量与复发。
items.summaryZh: 这项对儿童鼻息肉慢性鼻窦炎（CRSwNP）行功能性内镜鼻窦手术（FESS）的5年随访研究，旨在评估患者生活质量的动态变化及术后复发率，为临床决策提供证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 5-year follow-up study on pediatric chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps after FESS provides quality of life and recurrence data. It's more clinical outcomes focused than PT specific, but relevant for understanding post-surgical pediatric patient trajectories.
items.journal: Zhonghua er bi yan hou tou jing wai ke za zhi = Chinese journal of otorhinolaryngology head and neck surgery

items.title: Risk factors analysis of poor prognosis in ICU-admitted children with severe influenza pneumonia: a retrospective case-control study.
items.summary: A retrospective case-control study identifies independent prognostic risk factors for poor outcomes in pediatric ICU patients with severe influenza pneumonia.
items.curatedReason: This retrospective case-control study identifies risk factors for poor prognosis in pediatric ICU patients with severe influenza pneumonia (e.g., PEEP > 8 cm H2O, high PaCO2). While primarily for critical care teams, it informs PTs on patient acuity and potential respiratory complications.
items.titleZh: 重症流感肺炎患儿ICU入院预后不良的危险因素分析：一项回顾性病例对照研究。
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在调查重症流感肺炎患儿入住ICU后预后不良的独立危险因素，以指导早期风险分层和临床干预。研究纳入了139名合格的重症流感肺炎患儿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective case-control study identifies risk factors for poor prognosis in pediatric ICU patients with severe influenza pneumonia (e.g., PEEP > 8 cm H2O, high PaCO2). While primarily for critical care teams, it informs PTs on patient acuity and potential respiratory complications.

items.title: Measured and supervised physical exercise for older individuals with asthma, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease and obstructive sleep apnoea (MIOLI): protocol of a randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: Protocol for a randomized controlled trial (MIOLI) investigating measured and supervised physical exercise (Nordic walking) for older individuals with asthma, COPD, and obstructive sleep apnea.
items.curatedReason: This RCT protocol for older adults with asthma, COPD, and OSA examines Nordic walking effects. While the topic is relevant to geriatric and cardiopulmonary rehab, it's a protocol, not yet an outcome study. Hold for results.
items.titleZh: 患有哮喘、慢性阻塞性肺病和阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停的老年人的测量与监督体育锻炼（MIOLI）：一项随机对照试验方案。
items.summaryZh: 本文是“MIOLI”研究的方案，一项旨在为患有哮喘、慢性阻塞性肺病（COPD）和阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停（OSA）的老年人提供测量并监督进行的体育锻炼（北欧式健走）的随机对照试验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT protocol for older adults with asthma, COPD, and OSA examines Nordic walking effects. While the topic is relevant to geriatric and cardiopulmonary rehab, it's a protocol, not yet an outcome study. Hold for results.

items.title: Defining nonresponse to pulmonary rehabilitation by threshold scores for personality traits: a population-based study.
items.summary: This study defines threshold scores for personality traits associated with nonresponse to inpatient pulmonary rehabilitation (PR), aiming to optimize tailoring of PR programs.
items.curatedReason: This study (N=390) aimed to define threshold scores for personality traits predicting nonresponse to inpatient pulmonary rehab. Identifying personality traits linked to poor outcomes can help tailor PR programs, but the predictive value and clinical utility need further validation.
items.titleZh: 通过性格特征阈值评分定义肺康复依从性不佳：一项人群研究。
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在定义与住院肺康复（PR）依从性不佳相关的性格特征的阈值评分，以期优化PR项目的个体化调整。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study (N=390) aimed to define threshold scores for personality traits predicting nonresponse to inpatient pulmonary rehab. Identifying personality traits linked to poor outcomes can help tailor PR programs, but the predictive value and clinical utility need further validation.

items.title: Holistic management of symptom burden in fibrosing interstitial lung diseases (F-ILDs).
items.summary: This review summarizes current evidence for holistic management of symptom burden in fibrosing interstitial lung diseases (F-ILDs), emphasizing supportive care alongside antifibrotic treatment.
items.curatedReason: This review discusses holistic symptom management for fibrosing interstitial lung diseases (F-ILDs). While it covers symptom burden beyond disease-modifying therapies, it's a review and doesn't present new research findings relevant to PT intervention.
items.titleZh: 纤维化间质性肺病的症状负担整体管理。
items.summaryZh: 本文回顾了纤维化间质性肺病（F-ILDs）患者症状负担的整体管理策略，强调在抗纤维化治疗的同时，提供全面的支持性护理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review discusses holistic symptom management for fibrosing interstitial lung diseases (F-ILDs). While it covers symptom burden beyond disease-modifying therapies, it's a review and doesn't present new research findings relevant to PT intervention.

items.title: Radiofrequency for the treatment of pilonidal disease: results of a French prospective pilot study.
items.summary: A prospective pilot study (N=40) assesses the safety and efficacy of radiofrequency (RF) treatment for pilonidal disease, reporting high success and patient satisfaction.
items.curatedReason: This pilot study (N=40) evaluated radiofrequency (RF) for pilonidal disease. It shows promise with good safety and efficacy (85% success rate), but as a pilot, it needs larger trials for definitive conclusions. Consider it an emerging option.
items.titleZh: 射频治疗藏毛疾病：法国一项前瞻性试点研究的结果。
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性试点研究（N=40）评估了射频（RF）治疗藏毛疾病的安全性和有效性，报告了较高的成功率（85%）和患者满意度。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot study (N=40) evaluated radiofrequency (RF) for pilonidal disease. It shows promise with good safety and efficacy (85% success rate), but as a pilot, it needs larger trials for definitive conclusions. Consider it an emerging option.

items.title: Association Between Outpatient Physical Therapist Personality and Patient Management Outcomes: A Preliminary Study.
items.summary: This preliminary study examines the association between outpatient physical therapist personality traits and patient management outcomes.
items.curatedReason: This preliminary study (N=103) explores the association between PT personality and patient outcomes. While intriguing, the small sample size and preliminary nature mean you shouldn't base practice decisions on this yet. Further research is needed.
items.titleZh: 门诊物理治疗师的个性与其患者管理结局的关联性：一项初步研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项初步研究（N=103）初步探讨了门诊物理治疗师的个性特征与患者管理结局之间的关联，提示非医疗因素可能影响患者治疗效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preliminary study (N=103) explores the association between PT personality and patient outcomes. While intriguing, the small sample size and preliminary nature mean you shouldn't base practice decisions on this yet. Further research is needed.

items.title: Impact of balneotherapy on drug consumption: a systematic review and an economic evaluation of drug deprescribing.
items.summary: A systematic review and economic evaluation suggest balneotherapy may reduce drug consumption, exploring potential societal monetary savings.
items.curatedReason: While this systematic review suggests balneotherapy might decrease drug consumption, the economic evaluation is geared towards societal savings, not direct clinical impact for PTs. The evidence level for a PT intervention is low.
items.titleZh: 水疗对药物消耗的影响：一项系统综述和经济学评估。
items.summaryZh: 该系统综述及经济学评估表明，水疗可能有助于减少药物消耗，并探讨了潜在的社会经济节约效应。
items.curatedReasonEn: While this systematic review suggests balneotherapy might decrease drug consumption, the economic evaluation is geared towards societal savings, not direct clinical impact for PTs. The evidence level for a PT intervention is low.

items.title: Post-traumatic Bone Marrow Edema of the Foot in a Child: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report details post-traumatic bone marrow edema of the foot in an 11-year-old boy, managed conservatively with rest and physical therapy.
items.curatedReason: This case report describes post-traumatic bone marrow edema of the foot in a child, treated conservatively with rest and PT. It's a good reminder of differential diagnosis in pediatric foot pain but offers no new insights.
items.titleZh: 儿童创伤后足部骨髓水肿：一则病例报告。
items.summaryZh: 本病例报告描述了一名11岁男孩因跌倒导致右足创伤后骨髓水肿的病例，该病例通过休息和物理治疗等保守方法得到管理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report describes post-traumatic bone marrow edema of the foot in a child, treated conservatively with rest and PT. It's a good reminder of differential diagnosis in pediatric foot pain but offers no new insights.

items.title: Does resistance training make a difference to the quality of life or heart health for older adults compared to aerobic exercise? A systematic review protocol from The People's Review.
items.summary: Protocol for a systematic review from The People's Review investigating whether resistance training impacts quality of life or heart health in older adults compared to aerobic exercise.
items.curatedReason: This is a systematic review protocol from 'The People's Review' comparing resistance vs. aerobic exercise for older adults' quality of life and heart health. As it's a protocol, no results are available yet. Wait for the full review.
items.titleZh: 与有氧运动相比，阻力训练对老年人生活质量或心脏健康是否有影响？一项来自“人民回顾”的系统性综述方案。
items.summaryZh: 本文是“人民回顾”项目的一项系统性综述方案，旨在调查与有氧运动相比，阻力训练是否能对老年人的生活质量或心脏健康产生影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a systematic review protocol from 'The People's Review' comparing resistance vs. aerobic exercise for older adults' quality of life and heart health. As it's a protocol, no results are available yet. Wait for the full review.

items.title: Improving facial scar outcomes: an evidence-based update.
items.summary: This evidence-based update reviews current prophylactic and therapeutic scar management techniques for facial scars, relevant for ENT surgeons.
items.curatedReason: This review updates evidence on facial scar management for ENT surgeons. While informative on techniques like dressings and laser therapy, it lacks specific PT applications and is highly specialized.
items.titleZh: 改善面部瘢痕结局：一项基于证据的更新。
items.summaryZh: 本文为一篇基于证据的更新综述，总结了针对耳鼻喉科外科医生而言，用于面部瘢痕的预防性和治疗性管理技术的最新证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review updates evidence on facial scar management for ENT surgeons. While informative on techniques like dressings and laser therapy, it lacks specific PT applications and is highly specialized.
items.journal: Current opinion in otolaryngology & head and neck surgery

items.title: Rethinking Health System Readiness for Frailty Management: Frontline Perspectives from Indonesia and Malaysia.
items.summary: This study examines frontline healthcare perspectives on health system readiness for frailty management in Indonesia and Malaysia.
items.curatedReason: This qualitative study explores frontline perspectives on frailty management readiness in Indonesia and Malaysia. While important for global health policy, it has no direct application for US/AU/CN PT practice.
items.titleZh: 关于衰弱症管理，卫生系统准备就绪的思考：来自印度尼西亚和马来西亚一线医护人员的观点。
items.summaryZh: 本研究探讨了印度尼西亚和马来西亚一线医护人员对卫生系统在应对衰弱症（frailty）管理方面的准备情况的看法，对于理解全球老龄化挑战下的卫生系统改革具有参考意义。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores frontline perspectives on frailty management readiness in Indonesia and Malaysia. While important for global health policy, it has no direct application for US/AU/CN PT practice.
items.journal: Health care analysis : HCA : journal of health philosophy and policy

items.title: Orthopaedic Trauma Management in Developing Countries: A Narrative Review of Clinical Practices, Socioeconomic Challenges, and Healthcare Outcomes.
items.summary: This review examines orthopaedic trauma management in developing countries, synthesizing evidence on clinical practices, socioeconomic challenges, and healthcare outcomes.
items.curatedReason: This narrative review focuses on orthopaedic trauma management in developing countries, highlighting clinical practices and socioeconomic challenges. It's relevant for global health contexts but offers little direct guidance for PT practice in the US, China, or Australia.
items.titleZh: 发展中国家的骨科创伤管理：临床实践、社会经济挑战与卫生保健结局的叙述性综述。
items.summaryZh: 本文综述了发展中国家骨科创伤管理的现状，重点关注临床实践、社会经济挑战及卫生保健结局，揭示了这些地区面临的独特困境。
items.curatedReasonEn: This narrative review focuses on orthopaedic trauma management in developing countries, highlighting clinical practices and socioeconomic challenges. It's relevant for global health contexts but offers little direct guidance for PT practice in the US, China, or Australia.

items.title: Transforming chronic low back pain management in Bangladesh: implications for rehabilitation in low- and middle-income countries.
items.summary: This article discusses transforming chronic low back pain management in Bangladesh, highlighting rehabilitation implications for low- and middle-income countries.
items.curatedReason: This article discusses transforming chronic low back pain management in Bangladesh, focusing on rehabilitation implications for LMICs. It offers context on global CLBP burden but lacks specific practice recommendations for PTs in the US, China, or Australia.
items.titleZh: 变革孟加拉国慢性下腰痛管理：对低收入和中等收入国家康复的启示。
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了如何在孟加拉国变革慢性下腰痛（CLBP）的管理模式，并分析了这对低收入和中等收入国家（LMICs）康复服务的启示。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article discusses transforming chronic low back pain management in Bangladesh, focusing on rehabilitation implications for LMICs. It offers context on global CLBP burden but lacks specific practice recommendations for PTs in the US, China, or Australia.

items.title: Finding Voice: Experiences of Underrepresented Minority Faculty in Physical Therapist Education: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: This qualitative study explores the experiences of underrepresented minority faculty in physical therapist education programs in the US.

items.titleZh: 发声：物理治疗教育中代表性不足的少数族裔教职员工的经历：一项定性研究。

items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores experiences of underrepresented minority faculty in PT education. It highlights systemic issues in academia but offers no direct clinical insights for PT practice.

items.title: [Correspondence] Minocycline for acute ischaemic stroke: limitations of the EMPHASIS trial
items.summary: Correspondence critically evaluating the EMPHASIS trial on minocycline for acute ischemic stroke, highlighting limitations that temper confidence in its generalizability.
items.curatedReason: This correspondence critiques the EMPHASIS trial on minocycline for acute ischemic stroke, citing limitations in its design and generalizability. It's a critical commentary on a medical trial, not a PT-focused news item.
items.titleZh: [通信] 亚急性缺血性中风的米诺环素：EMPHASIS试验的局限性
items.summaryZh: 这封通信批评了关于使用米诺环素治疗亚急性缺血性中风的EMPHASIS试验，指出了其设计和普遍适用性方面的局限性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This correspondence critiques the EMPHASIS trial on minocycline for acute ischemic stroke, citing limitations in its design and generalizability. It's a critical commentary on a medical trial, not a PT-focused news item.

items.title: Clinical Characteristics and Outcomes of Pediatric Hemophagocytic Lymphohistocytosis: A Retrospective Study from a Tertiary Center in Jordan.
items.summary: A retrospective study from Jordan describes the clinical characteristics and outcomes of pediatric hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis (HLH), a severe hyperinflammatory syndrome.
items.curatedReason: This retrospective study describes clinical characteristics and outcomes of pediatric HLH in Jordan. While relevant to a rare pediatric condition, it offers limited direct application for physical therapists without specific PT outcome data.
items.titleZh: 儿童噬血细胞性淋巴组织细胞增生症的临床特征和结局：约旦一家三级中心的で的回顾性研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项来自约旦的回顾性研究描述了儿童噬血细胞性淋巴组织细胞增生症（HLH）的临床特征和结局，这是一种严重的过激炎症综合征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study describes clinical characteristics and outcomes of pediatric HLH in Jordan. While relevant to a rare pediatric condition, it offers limited direct application for physical therapists without specific PT outcome data.
items.journal: International journal of hematology-oncology and stem cell research
